description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - OSX/Linux via Conda that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.12 in both Release and Debug build types. For each job, check out the repository, set up a Conda environment with Python, and build and test Pinocchio using CMake and CTest. Also, include a check job that runs after the build job and verifies its success.
